beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid  have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Celta de Vigo vs Real Oviedo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
beIN SPORTS 3.title: Celta de Vigo vs Real Oviedo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Celta de Vigo are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga matches against Real Oviedo, keeping a clean sheet in both. Never in their history have the Galician side recorded three consecutive clean sheets against the Asturian side in the top-flight. Real Oviedo have not won any of their last nine away LaLiga games against Celta de Vigo, losing on their last six visits. This is their worst run of consecutive away defeats against the Vigo team in the competition's history.
